title: Fresh Fancy Horizon - FFH
description: various animation, immersive ambient and Distant horizon
body:
# Introduction
- A broad horizon is not enough. We hope it will be full of life. The modpack was created to quench the thirst.
- This mode doesn't offer any convenience, it stays vanilla intact and has only visual enhancements.

- Optimization has improved a lot compared to the past, and there have been a number of overlapping features. This modpack will provide maximum effect with minimal mode so that each other's functionality doesn't invade.

- This modpack will always be aimed at the latest version of Minecraft and will follow. This will ensure that the world we've worked so hard on is not abandoned despite frequent official updates, and will ensure it's sustainable.

## Preview Content

**Main mods**
1. Distant Horizons: https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons

**Immersive Mods**
1. Immersive UI: https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ui
2. Cool Rain: https://modrinth.com/mod/coolrain
3. Particle Rain: https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain
4. Hold My Items: https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items
5. Subtle Effects: https://modrinth.com/mod/subtle-effects
6. Particle Effects: https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-effects
7. Dynamic Crosshair: https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair


**included resource packs**
1. Fresh animation: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations
2. Detailed animations: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/detailed-animations
3. Shrimp's Immersive Interfaces: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shrimps-immersive-interfaces

**included shader packs**

1. Complementary Shaders - Unbound: https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound 
> (It's the best fit )
2. Photon shader: https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader 
> ( It's generally perfect, but there can be some errors in the vast underground cave )

## Requirements ( JAVA 21 )
8GB - This is the optimum amount of RAM for Distant Horizons. with something resourcepacks

*10GB or more can cause performance degradation. Choose only when applying vast terrain generation modes  or large content modes



Discord: https://discord.gg/wNg4HB4Z
